# discord_member_nickname (Resource)

A resource to manage a member's server nickname.

## Example Usage

```terraform
resource "discord_member_nickname" "jake" {
  user_id   = var.user_id
  server_id = var.server_id
  nick      = "Jake"
}
```

<!-- schema generated by tfplugindocs -->
## Schema

### Required

- `server_id` (String) ID of the server to manage the nickname in.
- `user_id` (String) ID of the user to manage the nickname for.

### Optional

- `nick` (String) Server nickname to set for the member. Omit or set to an empty string to clear the nickname.

### Read-Only

- `id` (String) The ID of this resource.

## Import

Import is supported using the following syntax:

The [`terraform import` command](https://developer.hashicorp.com/terraform/cli/commands/import) can be used, for example:

```shell
terraform import discord_member_nickname.example "<server id>:<member id>"
```
